A cluster of highly efficient solar panels. It has a high reliability and efficiency. Needs regular maintenance.
A cluster of large-capacity batteries used energy storage. It provides a very important backup during low solar activity.
A special module equipped with broadband sensors. It is designed to search for new resources on the map (also known as "unknown spots").
A standard residential block for the Station's crew. King size beds and personal lockers provide a home away from home.

Fitted with pulse lasers usually installed in small space craft weapon systems. Believed to allow scaling up to provide cost effective station defense. While having a short range, it boasts a high fire rate.
250 different vibromassage programs and sounds of nature will help your crew relax and forget about work... For a while.
An oxygen storage module. Increases the total amount of oxygen that can be stored at the Station.

descriptions.value: After 5 fires, 7 arguments and more failed orders than we dare to mention...We know its frustrating, but it's no good crying over spilt milk.
The goodest boy in all of the Onion Kingdom!

Majestic, valiant, regal...Kevin is a true leader through and through! 

...Let's just hope the Onion King doesn't catch him playing dress up again!
With the Necronomicon held firmly in his hands, the Onion King ponders to himself... What could possibly go wrong?
Hip, fly and about to become your mane guy!
"You're toast!" proclaimed the Onion King after staving off the threat of the Unbread!
Too many cooks won't spoil the stew...but the burnt ingredients probably will.
If you think the Raccoon Chef isn't your favourite... You're wrong.
He is a-mage-ing!
She's sweet as pie and ready to fry!

Don't be salty...It's not about winning!

It's about the friends you lost along the way.
That friendly wave, happy smile, calm posterior... You can tell she's new to Overcooked!

The Onion Kingdom didn't knead the hassle of an Unbread Apocalypse.

Saving the day is the yeast you could do or the whole kingdom will be toast! Crust me...it won't be easy.
+2 points
